phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy match tickets
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on acheter des billets pour le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TOHN ash-TAY day bee-YEH poor luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets for Olympique Lyonnais (OL) matches are sold online at ol.fr and at the stadium box office. Popular fixtures against Paris Saint-Germain or Saint-Étienne sell out well in advance.

responses.english: Online or at the stadium ticket office.
responses.phonetic: ahn LEE-nyuh oo oh ghee-SHEH doo STAD
responses.local: En ligne ou au guichet du stade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the correct stand
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer comment rejoindre ma tribune ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-vay-VOO man-dee-KAY koh-MAHN ruh-ZHWANDR mah tree-BOON
phrases.cultural_note: Groupama Stadium is divided into four tribunes: Nord, Sud, Est, and Ouest. Check your ticket carefully and follow the colour-coded signage around the stadium.

phrases.intent_en: Order a drink and snack at a concession stand
phrases.text_local: Une bière et un sandwich, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: oon BYAIR ay uhn SAHND-weech, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Stadium food at Groupama is a step above average French stadia, with local bouchon-inspired snacks alongside standard options. Beer is served but check kickoff regulations.

responses.english: A beer and a sandwich, please.
responses.phonetic: oon BYEHR ay uhn sahnd-WEESH, seel voo PLEH
responses.local: Une bière et un sandwich, s'il vous plaît.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get back to the city centre after the match
phrases.text_local: Comment rentrer en ville après le match ?
phrases.pronunciation: koh-MAHN rahn-TRAY ahn VEEL ah-PREH luh MATCH
phrases.cultural_note: Special tram services run between the stadium and the city centre on match days. The T7 line connects to Décines-Grand Large station. Expect queues immediately after the final whistle.

responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY luh TRAM tay-TRWAH, dee-rek-SYOHN par-DYUH
responses.local: Prenez le tram T3, direction Part-Dieu.

phrases.intent_en: Show appreciation for a goal as a visiting fan
phrases.cultural_note: Derbi del Ródano (the Lyon vs Saint-Étienne derby) is one of France's most intense rivalries. Away fans are kept in a designated section. Be respectful and avoid displaying opposition colours in home sections.
